title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0097 7 Bellevue Cottages, Clifton, Bristol, BS8 4TG
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Mrs Gay  Site address:  7 Bellevue Cottages, Clifton, Bristol, BS8 4TG  Description of proposed development:  Change of use from a (C3) residential dwelling to a (C4) small house of multiple occupation  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 7 May 2025   Date by when representations must be made 12 June 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 2 July 2025   Decision date 27 June 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 129 KB, 6 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 12 June 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0097 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Application Forms (amended)  (PDF, 8.01 MB, 14 pages)  24-0450-001A Location and Ex Block Plan  (PDF, 377 KB, 1 page)  24-0450-020 Existing Floor Plans HMO  (PDF, 133 KB, 1 page)  24-0450-021 Proposed Floor Plans HMO  (PDF, 150 KB, 1 page)  24-0450-022 EX and PR Elevations HMO  (PDF, 289 KB, 1 page)  24-0450-023A Pr Site and Block Plan HMO  (PDF, 357 KB, 1 page)  3M-424 - Heritage Statement  (PDF, 84.1 KB, 2 pages)  3M-424 -7 Bellevue Cottages Design and Access Statement  (PDF, 199 KB, 5 pages)  3MP - BNG Exemption Statement  (PDF, 409 KB, 2 pages)   Questionnaire and supporting documents   S62A Questionnaire at application  (PDF, 146 KB, 6 pages)  2 Appendix A1 - Draft HMO SPD - Adoption Version - V3  (PDF, 1.62 MB, 26...
